items.line_en: The election question.

items.line_en: The election day was coming up everywhere, even at my school, but I had a problem.

coach.hint: Chunk it: The election day was coming up everywhere, / even at my school, / but I had a problem.

items.line_en: My two best friends were running for school president.

coach.say: My two best friends were running for school president.
coach.hint: Chunk it: My two best friends were running for school president.

items.line_en: I could only vote for one of them.

coach.say: I could only vote for one of them.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I could only vote for one of them.

items.line_en: Abby is really smart. She's my next door neighbor.

coach.hint: Chunk it: She moved here a couple years ago.

items.line_en: Matt is really popular.

coach.say: But how could I choose between my best friends?
coach.hint: Chunk it: But how could I choose between my best friends?

items.line_en: I wish there was no election.

coach.hint: Chunk it: She said,

coach.hint: Chunk it: Voting is a privilege.
